ddt:Target.Name: ITM P2 V2.4
ddt:Target.Description:
IT master ECU navigation
X91
August 10th 2005, first version September 27th 2005, B2 validation January 13rd 2006, BDV validation February 14th 2006, C1 validation, ajout paramètre Bluetooth March 1st 2006, C1 validation, correction du status Bluetooth 19 09 06, update trame Ident R2
Lionel PELLETIER 65450 Diagnostic multimédia tél: 01768 54035 lionel.pelletier-renexter@renault.com
Modification Par C.CANDAS le 26/01/2006 - Correction de la trame ReadDTC

Item.Text: Flash ROM error of control unit

Data.Name: Output Permanent Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Item.Text: open circuit or short circuit to ground
open circuit or short circuit to battery
test card 1 color bars on progress
test card 2 grey scales on progress
test card 3 white screen on progress

Data.Name: Session Name
Data.Comment: Mode d'ouverture de la section diag

Data.Name: Status: close
Data.Comment: open / close button for map DVD

Data.Name: parameter: GPSSTAT: positionning
Data.Comment: niveau de réception GPS: positionning status

Data.Name: parameter: GPSSTAT: 2D positionning
Data.Comment: niveau de réception GPS: 2D positionning status

Data.Name: parameter: GPSSTAT: 3D positionning
Data.Comment: niveau de réception GPS: 3D positionning status

Data.Name: parameter: GPSSTAT: number
Data.Comment: niveau de réception GPS: number of satellites

Data.Name: parameter: Bluetooth device 05 address
Data.Comment: adresse Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus fort

Data.Name: parameter: Bluetooth device 05 level
Data.Comment: niveau de réception Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus fort

Data.Name: parameter: Bluetooth device 05 name
Data.Comment: nom Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus fort

Data.Name: parameter: Bluetooth device 01 address
Data.Comment: adresse Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus faible

Data.Name: parameter: Bluetooth device 01 level
Data.Comment: niveau de réception Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus faible

Data.Name: parameter: Bluetooth device 01 name
Data.Comment: nom Bluetooth de l'équipement le plus faible

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Numero de DVD de Navigation en Hexa

Request.Name: Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: Test display grey scale test card
DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Device.Name: Flash ROM error of control unit

Send.RequestName: Test display grey scale test card
Test display grey scale test card

Button.Text: HFCK: audio lines test (need test stub)
HFCK: serial lines test (need test stub)
